ai_summary: Here's a 2-3 sentence executive summary of the provided document:  PNC Infratech Limited has successfully signed concession agreements for two Hybrid Annuity Mode (HAM) highway projects with the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI), totaling a significant Rs. 3483.00 crore. This material development substantially bolsters the company's order book and future revenue pipeline, reinforcing its position in the infrastructure sector. No immediate red flags are apparent in this straightforward announcement of new project awards.
